blended.narrative: Willamette Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
